name: fretboard.js
when_to_use: 需要把音阶、和弦或 CAGED 把位画成带弦格与音符高亮的吉他指板时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生在品格几何、调弦换算和把位高亮的一致性上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能列音名或画近似网格,无法可靠完成弦×品坐标、非线性品距、异调弦与音阶位置映射;上游把这些计算和 SVG 描绘闭环。

data_in.note: 主输入是弦号×品号网格;view 决定调用 setDots/renderScale/renderChord 三个上游原生入口,不要把三种数据混在一次调用里。

dots?.string: integer 1..stringCount —— 人类编号,1 为最高音弦
dots?.note?: string —— 显示/样式元数据,默认省略

scale?.type: string —— Tonal 音阶名,如 'major' 或 'dorian'

schema.chord?: string —— 从第 6 弦到第 1 弦的指法串,如 x32010;十品以上用连字符分隔;默认省略
schema.tuning?: string[] —— 低音弦到高音弦,默认 ['E2','A2','D3','G3','B3','E4']

spec.note: SVG 仍需稳定几何尺寸;默认显式传 height 260px,width 取容器像素宽或 800px,禁用 vh/百分比高。容器宽变化后重新创建实例以重算 SVG。

en.when_to_use: Use it to draw scales, chords, or CAGED positions on a guitar fretboard with strings, frets, and highlighted notes instead of hand-writing SVG, which tends to fail at fret geometry, tuning conversion, and consistent position highlighting.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to listing note names or drawing an approximate grid and cannot reliably map string x fret coordinates, nonlinear fret spacing, alternate tunings, and scale positions. Upstream closes the loop between these calculations and SVG rendering.

data_in.note: The main input is a string-number x fret-number grid. view selects one of the three native upstream entry points: setDots, renderScale, or renderChord. Do not mix their data in a single call.

dots?.string: integer 1..stringCount -- human numbering, where 1 is the highest-pitched string
dots?.note?: string -- display/style metadata; omitted by default
dots?.interval?: string -- for example '1P' or '3M'; omitted by default

scale?.root: string -- root note, such as 'C' or 'F#'
scale?.type: string -- Tonal scale name, such as 'major' or 'dorian'

schema.chord?: string -- fingering from string 6 to string 1, such as x32010; separate frets 10 and above with hyphens; omitted by default
schema.tuning?: string[] -- low string to high string; default ['E2','A2','D3','G3','B3','E4']
schema.fretCount?: integer > 0 -- number of frets shown; default 15

spec.note: The SVG still needs stable geometry dimensions. Pass an explicit height of 260px by default; width is the container's pixel width or 800px. Do not use vh or percentage heights. Recreate the instance after container-width changes so the SVG is recalculated.

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):从 jsDelivr /npm/ 导入 Fretboard,给容器显式 260px 高,再按 view 调上游原生 renderScale/renderChord/setDots。

peer.note: 复杂和弦/音阶先由 tonal 算出正确音符集合或规范名称;本条负责指板几何和 SVG,不预设回调或统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:纯 ESM + SVG,所有生成 DOM 落传入的 shadow 容器,无 CSS/worker/font/uplink 足迹
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG,无 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: +esm scan: 0 `document.head`, 0 createElement('style') -> styling via inline SVG attributes/classes, no global stylesheet. 0 `document.body` -> all SVG rendered into the passed container el via d3. 0 document/window addEventListener -> hover handlers bind to SVG elements via d3 .on(); Fretboard.d.ts exposes removeEventListeners() for cleanup. Pure ESM+SVG fully contained in the passed shadow container.
